refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability to inputs, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine for performance metrics
Structured data repository for requirement records
Version-controlled management system for updates and history
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software subsystem combining derivation algorithms, structured data storage, and version control for performance requirement lifecycle management

potential_sources: Data flow between derivation and recording modules
Update propagation between management and recording
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is expected and managed within a single integrated subsystem to maintain consistency and traceability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if version control is not robust
High safety criticality requires rigorous validation of derivation algorithms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure modular design within the integrated subsystem to isolate derivation, recording, and management functions for maintainability and safety assurance.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software subsystem responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management within the overall NGHE system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context and operational data for performance requirement derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets and updates to other system components

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication for updates, baselines, and calibration history synchronization

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary module for this DP; high containment and low diffusion expected.
Vehicle module has minimal containment; would cause high diffusion if assigned here.
Not relevant for performance requirement derivation and management.
Safety Services may consume performance data but is not responsible for derivation or management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning the DP to the NGHE Solution module centralizes performance requirement lifecycle management, minimizing diffusion and supporting traceability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity within NGHE Solution if not properly modularized
Risk of interface overload if external interfaces are not well defined
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear internal module boundaries within NGHE Solution to separate derivation, recording, and management functions and ensure interface clarity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR sub-functions with clear traceability and verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized assignment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented performance targets and history logs within NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Further modularize NGHE Solution internally to reduce complexity
Clarify interface protocols on Telemetry, Tasking, and Network Link to avoid ambiguity

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, internal modularization within NGHE Solution and interface clarifications are needed to reduce complexity and diffusion risks.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: To define internal module boundaries within NGHE Solution and clarify external interface specifications.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can support integrated software functions
open_risks: Complexity within NGHE Solution may impact maintainability
Interface ambiguity could cause integration issues
evidence_needed: Detailed internal architecture of NGHE Solution
Interface protocol specifications for Telemetry, Tasking, and Network Link
